summary: Order management app with karigar (craftsperson) tracking, design management, and PDF export functionality. Fixing three issues: karigar export PDF format (design image + grouped orders per design code), karigar name sync from Master Design page not reflecting in Total Orders and Karigar tabs, and desktop sidebar/dashboard overlap.
architectural_notes: Karigar names are managed via a Master Design page (design code, generic name, karigar name) and updates must sync to Total Orders tab and Karigar tab
Karigar export PDF format groups orders by design code with design image displayed above each group
known_issues: Karigar export PDF no longer includes design images with grouped orders per design code after recent updates
Karigar mapping update (Prasanna) not reflected in Total Orders tab — CHTMN40046 still shows SANTU; Prasanna tab in Karigar section shows no orders
Desktop sidebar and main dashboard content are overlapping

existing_features.title: Restore the karigar PDF export format in KarigarDetail.tsx so that the exported PDF groups orders by design code, displays the design image above each group, and lists all orders belonging to that design code below the image — matching the original KASI_orders_2026-02-27.pdf layout.

Fix the karigar name sync so that when a karigar name is updated on the Master Designs page (MasterDesigns.tsx / EditDesignModal.tsx), the updated name (e.g., Prasanna for design code CHTMN40046) is immediately reflected in the Total Orders tab and the Karigar tab. The karigar tab for Prasanna must show all orders mapped to that design code, and the Total Orders tab must display Prasanna instead of the old name SANTU for CHTMN40046.

Fix the desktop layout in App.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so the sidebar and the main dashboard content do not overlap. The sidebar should occupy its own fixed or sticky column and the main content area should be offset correctly to sit beside the sidebar without any overlap.
